perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young girl with a pink bow headband is seen in a close-up, eating with a spoon and smiling at the camera. (2) The scene transitions to a young woman in a white t-shirt (the creator) hugging the little girl in a restaurant setting. (3) Transition to a young boy sitting at a table; the creator is seen talking to him from the side. (4) Transition to a young man with glasses sitting next to the creator; he listens and then rolls his eyes at her. (5) Transition to an older woman eating noodles; the creator leans in to talk to her while she continues to handle her chopsticks.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, cheerful background music starts. A female voice (the creator) tells a child she was sad and bought bread; the child's voice responds with an affectionate 'I care about you' and offers a hug. (2) The female voice repeats the same scenario to a boy; the boy's voice asks pragmatically, 'What kind of bread?'. (3) The female voice repeats the story to a young man; he asks why she was sad, and after her playful response, he lets out a mock sigh. (4) The female voice tells the story to an older woman; the woman responds with a confused, logical tone asking about the connection between mood and bread. Ambient restaurant chatter and clinking dishes are audible throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '當你測試家人的性格' (Hook: Testing family's personality). (2) '關心妳~~ (感性人格)' (Decorative: Caring about you - Emotional personality). (3) '什麼麵包? (理性人格)' (Functional: What bread? - Rational personality). (4) '幹嘛心情不好? (感性人格)' (Functional: Why the bad mood? - Emotional personality). (5) '翻白眼???' (Decorative: Rolling eyes???). (6) '心情不好跟麵包有什麼關係? (理性人格)' (Functional: What does a bad mood have to do with bread? - Rational personality).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Emotional Reaction (Child) -> Rational Reaction (Boy) -> Mixed Reaction (Man) -> Rational Reaction (Mother)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator, 1 little girl, 1 young boy, 1 young man with glasses, 1 older woman.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female creator wearing a white t-shirt with long dark hair, acting as the interviewer.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A traditional indoor restaurant with brick-patterned walls, wooden chairs, calligraphy scrolls on the wall, and tables with food.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut sync with visual cuts

vocal_qualities.tone: Varies from playful/mischievous to pragmatic and questioning

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Evidence -> Evidence -> Evidence -> Evidence
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a social experiment vlog utilizing a popular online 'Bread Test' meme to explore the different personality types (Emotional vs. Rational) of the creator's family members. By posing a logically disconnected statement ('I was sad so I bought bread'), she elicits and compares various reactions for the purpose of entertainment and relatable family content.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of MBTI-style personality labeling in captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a trend common on platforms like TikTok/Douyin where users test their loved ones' empathy vs. logic.
